title: Minecraft Ambient Overhaul
description: A Quilt 1.20.1 Modpack that overhauls the ambience, visuals, and feel of Minecraft.
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Minecraft_Ambient_Overhaul/BH_MAO_header.webp) ### An ongoing project to overhaul the ambient feel of Minecraft. ![Overview Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fec1b752876c4f7d95c28e35662462c62901b4e.webp) # Features - Dynamic music, effects and animations - A trailer-like vibe via Bare Bones - Optifine Parity with Resource Pack support - Lightweight + Performant - Quality updates [![BisectHosting Partnership](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64f6630d7f5491a20dafcf67f83405af2a285870.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/raamviot50) As a bypass to UBlock origin blocking server sponsor banners, I have to put this text here. Please tell them to revert this change [here.](https://github.com/uBlockOrigin/uAssets/issues/24130)
Attribution ## Attribution - [Hypersoop and Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) for some of their configuration files
